tools.name: ruff
tools.run_command: uv run ruff check components pipelines scripts
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff check --fix components pipelines scripts

tools.name: ruff format
tools.run_command: uv run ruff format --check components pipelines scripts
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff format components pipelines scripts

linting.notes: Linting is enforced via pre-commit hooks and CI. Ruff is configured with line-length=120, target Python 3.11, Google-style docstrings. Import guard ensures components/pipelines don't import third-party libraries at top level (must use lazy imports).

env_vars: GITHUB_TOKEN required for tests marked with @pytest.mark.gh_api
testing.fixtures_location: conftest.py at repo root provides pytest_sessionstart hook and setup_and_teardown_subprocess_runner fixture
testing.mock_patterns: Components use sys.modules mocking to avoid requiring heavy dependencies (see components/data_processing/automl/tabular_data_loader/tests/mocked_pandas.py)
testing.notes: Tests are organized in two categories: (1) Script tests in .github/scripts/*/tests/ and scripts/*/tests/ - these are unit tests for utility scripts. (2) Component/pipeline tests in components/*/tests/ and pipelines/*/tests/ - these include test_component_unit.py and test_component_local.py. Local tests use KFP LocalRunner and may require Docker. The pyproject.toml excludes components/ and pipelines/ from test discovery by default. Tests must be run from repo root. Some tests are marked with @pytest.mark.gh_api and require GITHUB_TOKEN.

gating_checks.name: python-lint
gating_checks.command: uv run ruff format --check && uv run ruff check && uv run python .github/scripts/check_imports/check_imports.py

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request to main and release-* branches. Workflows use matrix builds for Python 3.11 and 3.13 in scripts-tests.yml. Most checks only run on changed files to optimize CI time. The ci-checks.yml workflow orchestrates checking that all other CI checks have passed and adds a 'ci-passed' label. Pre-commit hooks mirror CI checks.

build.notes: UV is the package manager (replaces pip/pip-tools/poetry). Lock file is uv.lock. The package is kfp-components and includes many subpackages for components and pipelines. Development dependencies include both [test] and [lint] extras. Use 'uv sync --extra dev' to get both.

conventions.test_naming: test_* functions, Test* classes following pytest conventions
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports with 'from .. import' for relative component imports. Components/pipelines must use lazy imports for third-party libraries (enforced by import-guard).
conventions.notes: Code follows Google-style docstrings. Line length is 120 chars. Python 3.11+ target. Components are organized as: components/{category}/{subcategory?}/{name}/component.py with metadata.yaml and tests/. Similar for pipelines.

lint_commands.command: uv run ruff format --check components pipelines scripts

test_commands.notes: 10 passed in 0.08s - tests from scripts/ must run from repo root

container_recipe.notes: UV must be added to PATH after installation. Tests in scripts/ subdirectories must be run from repo root (not from within scripts/). Component local tests (test_component_local.py) require Docker and may not work in all container environments - use unit tests for validation. The conftest.py at repo root adds /app to sys.path for test imports.
